economic_notes: Nation owns T'it'q'et Economic Development Authority, 1050033 BC Ltd/Bridge River Management LP, and Rancherie Enterprises Ltd, all at 100% ownership, accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Statement of Operations shows three columns: Budget 2023, Actual 2023, and Actual 2022. Budget shows a deficit of $1,621,710 vs actual surplus of $3,560,421. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Segment - Resources expense of $998,527 reported; Segment - Taxation expense of $142,752 reported. Community and Human Services segment used as proxy for expenses_health. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + DFO + CMHC + FNHA + Province of BC + BCFN Gaming + ASETS + ISETS + Allocation to RRF = 5,409,829 + 263,695 + 184,076 + 789,424 + 60,000 + 485,597 + 60,739 + 12,615 + 100,120 + 22,402 (tax rebates treated as government transfer) + 8,192 (WOP) = 7,396,689 conservatively; used only clear government sources for total_government_transfers. OSR includes other revenue, rental revenue, trust allocation, taxation, BC Hydro, investment income.
